description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python codeqa/test that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow consists of three jobs: flake8, mypy, and test. The flake8 job checks code style with Flake8 on ubuntu-latest. The mypy job checks types with Mypy on ubuntu-latest. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, excluding certain combinations, and tests the code with pytest.
